overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a cloaked character walking through a misty rural landscape at night. The character transitions from a dirt path lined with wooden fences into an open grassy field with scattered trees and stone ruins.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural dirt path with wooden fencing

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path through a misty rural landscape at night, passing wooden fence posts and bare trees

entered.detail: winding dirt trail cutting through grassland with visible tire tracks
weathered wooden posts lining the left side of the path
weathered wooden posts lining the right side of the path
tall bare trees silhouetted against the dark blue night sky
distinctive dead tree with gnarled antler-like branches

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt path bordered by wooden fence posts through a misty autumn night. Bare trees stand against the dark sky as the character approaches a distinctive dead tree with antler-like branches.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grass field with stone wall ruins

events.description: character steps off the dirt path into tall grass, leaving the fenced trail behind

agents.ego_description: walking through dense tall grass away from the path, heading toward stone ruins in the open field

entered.detail: dense tall grass covering the ground where the character now walks
low stone walls running through the field, partially overgrown

segments.scene_description: Leaving the defined trail, the character moves into an open field of tall grass with stone wall ruins visible to the right. The dirt path falls away to the left as the character continues through the misty grassland toward distant trees.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a confined rural path into an expansive, misty grassland at night. It begins with the character walking along a narrow dirt trail bordered by wooden fence posts, passing bare trees under a dark sky. As the character approaches a distinctive dead tree with antler-like branches, the camera follows them as they veer away from the defined trail. The scene then opens into a wide field of tall grass, where the dirt path falls away to the left and stone wall ruins emerge on the right. Finally, the movement continues through the hazy landscape toward a cluster of distant trees.
